cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Drive weekday lunch orders for a fast-food restaurant using clear combo shortcuts, realistic pickup guidance, and a low-pressure CTA for office workers on a time limit
input.offer_info: single-person lunch combos, optional drink and side upgrades, self-pickup support, no fake instant-serve promise
input.audience_segment: office workers and students trying to finish lunch within a short break

mustInclude: scene-based opening around lunch break pressure, limited time, or wanting a stable quick meal
clear combo guidance for a first-order single meal rather than a generic product pile
CTA that collects pickup time, dine-in versus takeaway preference, and basic order direction
mustAvoid: invented bestseller certainty for every item

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote after-work fast-food orders by positioning the store as an easy dinner solution for commuters and small households who do not want to cook
input.offer_info: single meals, two-person share bundles, takeaway and delivery split, realistic timing guidance, no unsupported freshness absolutes
input.audience_segment: commuters, couples, and small families deciding whether to bring home a quick dinner

mustInclude: opening tied to end-of-day fatigue, not wanting to cook, or wanting an easy route home
clear distinction between solo combos and small shared bundles
CTA that asks for party size, order channel, and preferred pickup or delivery timing
mustAvoid: everyone in the family will love it claims

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a fast-food restaurant with a broad menu, no fully confirmed hero combo, and limited proof about what performs best across breakfast, lunch, and late-night demand
input.offer_info: breakfast items, lunch combos, snacks, and dinner bundles with limited public proof on best sellers
input.audience_segment: first-time customers comparing several nearby quick-service options before placing an order

mustInclude: conservative wording around popularity or hero-item certainty
implicit request for missing daypart focus, hero combo clarity, or order-channel context
copy that leans on decision guidance and use-case fit instead of hype
mustAvoid: claiming a signature combo without evidence

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Promote a fast-food restaurant near offices and a transit stop when lunch rush can slow service, seating is limited, and delivery timing varies by channel
input.offer_info: lunch rush traffic, self-pickup support, limited dine-in seats, partial delivery coverage, timing-sensitive combo offers
input.audience_segment: commuters and office workers deciding whether to order now, preorder, or pick up on the way

mustInclude: careful wording around rush-hour timing instead of instant-service promises
practical fallback path such as preorder, self-pickup, or off-peak visit guidance
CTA that collects timing, headcount, and order mode before confirming recommendations

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Push fast-food sales with top-ranked taste claims, instant serving promises, sold-out hype, and guaranteed no-line convenience messaging
input.offer_info: high lunch demand, pressure to increase quick orders, mixed dine-in and takeaway flow
input.audience_segment: cold local traffic comparing several quick meal options

mustInclude: explicit identification of risky ranking, urgency, and speed expressions inside risk_phrases
conservative rewrite that uses meal mission, combo clarity, and timing guidance instead of hype
trust built through real order-path explanation rather than explosive popularity language
mustAvoid: number-one or viral claims without evidence

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Grow orders by promising no-burden eating, not getting fat, all-day cheapest combos, and delivery that always stays hot and crisp
input.offer_info: budget-sensitive quick meals with drinks, fries, and add-ons, plus high risk around body, price, and fulfillment claims
input.audience_segment: mixed cold traffic looking for a convenient and affordable meal decision

mustInclude: explicit marking of risky body, price, and fulfillment phrases in risk_phrases
rewrite centered on portion choice, combo boundaries, and realistic channel guidance
CTA oriented to collecting timing, headcount, and order route before confirming suitable options
mustAvoid: always hot and crisp delivery guarantees
